name: Krispie Cookies by Frances
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening and butter together with the brown sugar until smooth.
2. Add the eggs, one at a time, then stir in the vanilla extract.
3. In a separate bowl, mix together the flour, baking soda, salt, cream of tartar, and Rice Krispies.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring gently until combined.
5. If desired, fold in chocolate chips or nuts.
6. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
7. Bake at 350°F for 12 to 15 minutes, or until golden brown and crisp.
